claimBoundary: This protocol can test bounded task behavior, semantic routing, recurrent context, online prediction, ecological selection, game-policy causality, replay, and cost. It cannot establish phenomenal consciousness, sentience, general intelligence, physical quantum advantage, CSPRNG security, or cross-family neural scaling.

protocolAuthority.canonicalRule: The executable source is authoritative for seed arrays, task fixtures, normalized outcomes, exclusions, resampling, denominator rules, and acceptance arithmetic. If prose differs, the protocol is invalid until a new version is committed before result generation.
protocolAuthority.fixtureCanonicalization: SHA-256 of JSON.stringify(V4_FAMILY_FIXTURES[familyId]) using source insertion order

predecessorFailuresRetained: enhanced did not separate from the V3 uniform random-action baseline
aggregate channel rotation did not establish mapping specificity
uniform exploration replacement did not establish substrate specificity
ten-class reachability did not establish per-family beneficial outcomes

families.task: 480 steps in eight 60-step segments: +x cue-present, +x resource-cue dropout, -x cue-present, -x resource-cue dropout, then repeat once. Goal direction remains observable in every segment; only the resource semantic cue is withheld in the four scored dropout segments.
families.primaryOutcome: dropout-goal-aligned-action-score [0,1]: mean over 240 scored dropout steps of ordinaryActionScore(deltaVelocityX,deltaVelocityZ,goalX,goalZ)
secondaryOutcomes: time to recover positive goal-aligned velocity after each reversal

families.task: 240-cadence delayed pressure prediction: 120 input indices under relationship A followed by 120 under reversed relationship B; feedback at cadence t updates only the prediction retained from input t-1. The shuffled control receives permuted training feedback, but every arm is scored against the same unshuffled true labels.
families.primaryOutcome: post-reversal-prediction-quality [0,1]: predictionQuality(predictions,labels) over inclusive label cadences 145..239

families.task: 240 matched Petri beats with preregistered resource-specialist and exploration-specialist strains; resource scarcity dominates beats 0..119 and exploration opportunity dominates beats 120..239
families.primaryOutcome: favored-adfitness-share [0,1]: mean over beats 80..119 and 200..239 of petriFavoredAdFitnessShare(favored,other)

families.task: 30 matched diplomacy rounds in balanced social-cooperation and threat/resource-defense regimes using identical initial strategies, histories, economies, and RNG tapes
families.primaryOutcome: regime-correct-move-rate [0,1]: titanCorrectMoveRate(cooperation under the social regime plus defection under the defense regime,60)

excludedFamilies.reason: ecological rate consumer lacks a frozen Phase-A primary task
separate from live Petri biologics and lacks a frozen Phase-A outcome
policy kernel has no frozen beneficial-outcome task
native neural/GOAP controller requires an independent world-state task
navigation-gain consumer has no native neural state
SuperMind path is outside the Phase-A shared-field evaluation
native ApexBrain task and capacity tiers are not frozen
native fusion/STDP task and capacity tiers are not frozen
neural assist outcome is not frozen
native SuperCreature task is not frozen
scalar-memory policy task is not frozen
visual architecture is not a neural controller

matchedArmLaw: environment RNG tape hash and draw count equal
dedicated surrogate RNG stream is isolated and hash-recorded where declared
only the declared controller arm differs

statistics.bootstrapInterval: unadjusted two-sided percentile paired-bootstrap interval for the mean full-minus-control normalized outcome
statistics.signFlipAlternative: one-sided paired sign-flip test for full-minus-control outcome greater than zero
statistics.multipleComparison: Holm step-down adjustment of one-sided sign-flip p-values within each family across every declared primary contrast; bootstrap intervals are not multiplicity-adjusted
statistics.effectSize: JSON-safe paired Cohen dz object (undefined with null value for fewer than two pairs or zero variance) plus paired median absolute normalized-point gain
statistics.missingRows: fail unless preregistered notEvaluated reason exists

acceptance.outcomeScale: every family primary outcome is normalized to [0,1] before contrasts
acceptance.inference: every declared primary contrast requires paired mean full-minus-control > 0, unadjusted paired-bootstrap 95% lower bound > 0, and Holm-adjusted one-sided paired sign-flip p < 0.05 within family
acceptance.semanticSpecificity: the full correct mapping must pass the inference rule against every declared cyclic-permutation contrast
acceptance.recurrentContext: ordinary full recurrence minus recurrence-disabled primary outcome must have paired median >= 0.05 absolute normalized outcome points and minimum per-seed delta >= -0.20 points, in addition to the inference rule
acceptance.adaptivePrediction: for each arm compute one true-label mean Brier per seed over scored cadences, then average those 64 seed errors; against both frozen and shuffled-training controls, (controlMeanBrier - adaptiveMeanBrier) / controlMeanBrier >= 0.05; controlMeanBrier <= 1e-12 is an undefined failing contrast; paired per-seed true-label quality deltas must also pass the inference rule
acceptance.familyBehavior: every declared primary contrast must pass; for ordinary organisms, Petri biologics, and Titans, every full-minus-control contrast requires paired median >= 0.05 absolute normalized outcome points and minimum per-seed delta >= -0.20 normalized points
acceptance.replay: same seed, arm, and task replays byte-identically
acceptance.numericalSafety: all signals, context states, predictor parameters, actions, outcomes, and snapshots finite and within declared bounds for 10000 faulted steps
acceptance.populationCost: ordinary population points 1000, 5000, 10000, 50000; log-log runtime slope <= 1.15; 50000 incremental median and every counterbalanced batch median < 3 ms; semantic storage exactly 17 bytes/entity
acceptance.neuralCapacity: not evaluated in Phase A because no three live within-family parameter tiers exist

publication.forestRule: one row per family using the declared contrast with the smallest across-seed mean full-minus-control delta (source-order tie break), unadjusted paired-bootstrap 95% interval, separate Holm-adjusted sign-flip pass marker, zero line, failures red, ineligible non-neural rows gray
